discovery.reason: No generated discovery report existed for 2026-07-03, so Radar performed a bounded fresh intake from current public research sources.
discovery.action: Added three reference-only candidate source profiles and queued Source Reviewer follow-up.

review.reason: Repository-context-aware skill security analysis may improve the review gate for all future third-party skill candidates, especially abandoned-repository hijack risk and false-positive reduction.
review.action: Created reviewed reference-only profile at sources/reviewed/repository-context-agent-skill-security.md and queued Risk Auditor checklist extraction.
review.resolution: Accepted as reviewed-reference-only. License and code/data reuse remain unverified; no normalization, packaging, or publication is allowed until Risk Auditor defines a local repository-context checklist.

review.reason: Realistic skill retrieval and refinement evaluation may define a better value metric for this repository than raw skill count.
review.action: Created reviewed reference-only profile at sources/reviewed/skill-usage-realistic-settings.md and queued Critic follow-up for retrieval/selectability quality.
review.resolution: Accepted as reviewed-reference-only. Repository exists and README aligns with arXiv record, but repository LICENSE file was not found and dataset/paper reuse terms were not verified. No normalization, packaging, publication, or benchmark execution is allowed.

review.reason: Multimodal GUI skill design may be a distinct reusable capability not represented by text-only skill formats.
review.action: Created reviewed reference-only profile at sources/reviewed/visualskill-multimodal-skills.md. Claimed repository returned 404 through the GitHub connector, so license, code, figure, benchmark, dataset, and MCP retrieval implementation reuse remain unverified.
review.resolution: Accepted as reviewed-reference-only. No normalization item was created because the claimed repository was unavailable and multimodal asset redistribution/safety policy is not yet defined.

catalog.reason: Catalog/package parity was blocked because dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md disagreed on skill and risk counts.
catalog.action: Verified refreshed catalog surfaces on main: package.json is 0.1.3; dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md both report 1173 skills, 2 high-risk entries, 409 medium-risk entries, and 759 unspecified-risk entries; dist/install-manifest.json points at the expected catalog files.
catalog.blocked_by: GitHub connector previously exposed repository file reads/writes but no workflow_dispatch start action for catalog-refresh.yml.
catalog.resolution: Closed after direct connector verification confirmed catalog/package parity on default branch commit df73293fa1032c1209f19cff8b8e74fa732a0bb1.

risk.reason: The reviewed source shows that skill review should account for repository context, marketplace references, and abandoned-repository hijack risk rather than relying only on isolated SKILL.md scans.
risk.action: Updated doctrine/ingestion-policy.md with a compact Repository Context Gate covering ownership, freshness, abandonment, README/code alignment, marketplace reference validity, scanner false-positive handling, and no blind execution of reproduction bundles.
risk.resolution: Closed as a doctrine hardening item. No third-party paper/code/data/figure content was copied; the source remains reviewed-reference-only and is not normalized or package-endorsed.

critic.reason: Reviewed skill-usage benchmark suggests raw catalog size is a weak value metric; local catalog quality should eventually include retrieval/selectability/refinement usefulness checks.
critic.action: Define a small non-executing quality rubric or report for sampling whether agents can retrieve and apply the right skills from the local catalog. Do not run the external benchmark or import datasets without separate license and execution-safety review.
